evals.prompt: Do deep research on the current state of local-first software sync engines.
evals.expected_output: Research-heavy run: plans facets, fans out parallel web-research-agents, iterates on gaps. Produces and AUTO-SAVES docs/quirk/explorations/<date>-local-first-sync.md opening with the '🧭 EXPLORATION — not a spec' banner. Themed, cited findings with a Sources section; Tensions and Open-questions sections present. NO spec, requirements, locked decisions, or implementation plan. Ends by offering the brainstorming handoff but does not invoke it.

evals.prompt: Let's brainstorm ideas around making a habit-tracking app that doesn't feel like a chore.
evals.expected_output: Ideation-heavy run at default intensity 0.5. Light scoping (2-4 questions) then surfaces >=5 distinct directions before drilling. Each direction is insight-paired with a one-line 'why this might actually work'. A challenge pass adds steelman + counter-argument per strong direction. Auto-saves an idea-landscape artifact with the banner and NO winner declared. No spec produced; handoff offered, not auto-invoked.

evals.prompt: explore wild monetization ideas for an open-source CLI tool --wild 0.9
evals.expected_output: Intensity parsed as 0.9 (Bold). Pulls in disruptive techniques (deliberately-wrong, contrarian-inversion, extreme-casing); larger quota (>=7) of genuinely unconventional directions. EVERY direction still passes the insight-pairing quality gate (no 'weird-for-weird's-sake' noise) and factual claims stay accurate. Auto-saved artifact records Intensity: 0.9 (Bold). Still no spec; handoff offered only.

evals.prompt: explore wild monetization ideas for an open-source CLI tool --wild 0.2
evals.expected_output: Same prompt at intensity 0.2 (Grounded): visibly fewer, more conventional/adjacent directions (quota >=3) than eval 3, while still insight-paired and accurate. Demonstrates the intensity dial modulating idea count and unconventionality without changing the no-spec gate or the insight bar.

evals.prompt: Build me a Stripe billing integration for my SaaS.
evals.expected_output: ROUTING NEGATIVE: this is a build request and must NOT trigger exploring-ideas. The correct skill is quirk:brainstorming (creative work that converges to a spec). exploring-ideas should not engage.
